blockedChanges.reason: HTML, metadata, and config updates are outside the V1 write policy.

safetyChecks.message: Write candidates are selected only from the regenerated dry-run result.
Write policy is limited to missing robots/sitemap file creations.
No eligible missing robots/sitemap creations were found.
Non-writable dry-run changes were reported and left untouched.
No existing files will be overwritten.
No Git operations, commits, branches, or GitHub calls will be performed.
No dependencies, package files, lockfiles, or config files will be changed.
No formatting or deploy commands will be run.
